description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a before_script that sets JOB_TIMESTAMP=$(date +'%Y%m%d-%H%M%S'), COMMIT_HASH_SHORT=${CI_COMMIT_SHA:0:8}, COMMIT_BRANCH_OR_TAG=$(echo $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME | sed 's#[/.:() ]#-#g'), REGISTRY_HOST=$CI_REGISTRY, REGISTRY_USER=$CI_REGISTRY_USER, REGISTRY_PASSWORD=$CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD, and REGISTRY_IMAGE=$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE. Define stages build and release and use the docker:dind service with a command that injects a certificate from $CERTIFICATE_URL if present. In the build stage add a build job using the openjdk:17-jdk image that runs "./gradlew build" and publishes artifacts from build/distributions/*.tar and build/reports. Also in the build stage add a build-docker-master job using docker:latest that echoes all computed variables, runs "docker login -u \"$REGISTRY_USER\" -p \"$REGISTRY_PASSWORD\" $REGISTRY_HOST", builds the image with "docker build --pull -t \"$REGISTRY_IMAGE:$COMMIT_BRANCH_OR_TAG-$COMMIT_HASH_SHORT\" ." and pushes it with "docker push \"$REGISTRY_IMAGE:$COMMIT_BRANCH_OR_TAG-$COMMIT_HASH_SHORT\" && echo \"== Pushed docker image $REGISTRY_IMAGE:$COMMIT_BRANCH_OR_TAG-$COMMIT_HASH_SHORT\"". In the release stage add a release-docker job using docker:latest that logs in, pulls the image with "docker pull \"$REGISTRY_IMAGE:$COMMIT_BRANCH_OR_TAG-$COMMIT_HASH_SHORT\"", retags it to "\"$REGISTRY_IMAGE:$COMMIT_BRANCH_OR_TAG\"" using "docker tag", and pushes it. Finally, add a release-docker-master job, also using docker:latest, that runs only on the master branch, logs in, pulls the same image, retags it to "\"$REGISTRY_IMAGE\"" (no suffix), and pushes it to the registry.
